title: jatropha pubescens
intro: Jatropha pubescens, also known as the hairy jatropha, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Jatropha pubescens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. The plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
